sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64195" key="luse/rws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῡσ-έρως</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n64195.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deliverer from love</tr_>, Sch.Verg.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Aen.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.520</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
